chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellanes Application No.S- 575 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.10.2025. Mr. Haji Muhammad Sulleman, Advocate for applicant. Syed Tofique Ahmed Shah, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for State. = Counsel for the applicant under instructions does not press this Criminal Miscellaneous Application which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE Tufail
